stemHtml: Which of the following conditions will be most challenging, in terms of handling, during take-off in a twin engine aircraft with wing mounted engines and clockwise rotating propellers?

options.a: A right engine failure with a heavy aeroplane.
options.b: A right engine failure with a light aeroplane.
options.c: A left engine failure with a light aeroplane.
options.d: A left engine failure with a heavy aeroplane.
